_meta: RPG-Maker-style SYSTEM config. Edit this file (data, no code) to change new-game behavior. Mirrors RM's System tab > Starting Position. newGame.creationMap = an optional BLANK BLACK stage loaded FIRST where the character_creation autorun runs; it ENDS by transferring to the real start (a transfer command with useSystemStart:true reads startMap/startX/startY below). Set creationMap to "" to skip the creation stage and spawn straight at the start.
